//: Copy to appsettings.Production.json on the deployed host (or set via env vars). See docs/DEPLOYMENT.md.

Cors.//: Browser-based clients (the Samsung TV/Tizen app) are CORS-bound; native Flutter clients are not. List every browser origin that must reach the API + SignalR. For a packaged Tizen widget, capture the Origin header it sends against this server (it is a fixed widget origin or the literal string "null") and add it below. Credentials are only sent for explicit, non-wildcard, non-null origins.

PublicRoomListing.//: Set to false to disable public active-room discovery (GET /api/v1/rooms returns an empty list). Leave true so the Samsung TV Join Room screen can list rooms.
